title: Fruiterra Season 5
description: Gotta catch 'em all in the new Cobblemon 1.7 update!
body:
## ✏️ Peach's Note One of my personal mods is receiving an update! Join us in the fifth season of Fruiterra where we explore the brand new Cobblemon Update 🎊 **What is in the update?** - New crops and cooking - Rideable Pokémon - A lot of new Pokémon models and animations - New Pokémon interactions with the world of Minecraft - Better EV/IV training and UI - Pokémon cosmetics and held item visuals ## ✨ Featured Mods - Cobblemon 1.7 - Another Furniture - Antique Atlas - Vanilla Backport - Simple Voice Chat - _plus a whole bunch of performance and visual mods_

## 🐱‍🚀 Peach's Challenges - Catch 'em all - Build your own towns inspired by the Pokémon universe - Build a transport network that links major towns and landmarks - Find and capture your favourite shiny - Create a safari zone with your friends and release a guide for visitors - Create a museum that displays dropped items from different species - Set up a breeding center and trade perfect offspring with new players - Establish your own Pokémon gym and challenge other players - _More Coming Soon_
